allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-vue-next'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k !== 'default' && /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(names.slice\(0,20\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-vue-next'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && k !== 'default' && typeof icons[k] === 'object'\); console.log\(names.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(names.slice\(0,10\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-vue-next'\); const keys = Object.keys\(icons\); console.log\(typeof icons['Users']\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(icons['Users']\)\).slice\(0,100\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-vue-next'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && k !== 'default' && typeof icons[k] === 'function'\); console.log\(names.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(names.slice\(0,15\)\)\)")
